texto: Turning the safety argument on its head, we now propose that what women need in order to maximize their access to public space as citizens is not greater surveillance or protectionism (however well meaning), but the right to take risks.
explicacao: Citação de Shilpa Phadke sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Turning the safety argument on its head, we now propose that what women need in order to maximize…” articula reflexao, feminism, turning em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
